column21: Founded in 2009, Monte Carlo Capital is an early-stage venture fund based in Monaco, Monaco. The firm invests primarily at Seed and selectively at Pre-Seed and Series A in deep tech and tech-enabled disruptors across sectors such as AI, SpaceTech, enterprise software, and the future of work. The firm's 2nd fund is targeted at $30M, using co-investment SPVs to build larger positions over time. The firm's strategy is to get onto outstanding cap tables early, co-invest alongside many of the world's leading funds and accelerators, and continue backing the strongest companies as they scale via SPVs. The firm focuses on businesses solving large, meaningful problems through technology and invests only where there is a credible path to multi-billion-dollar outcomes. The firm operates as a value-added co-investor across the US and Europe, investing alongside other leading VCs.
